title: selago galpinii
intro: Selago galpinii, also known as Blue Dragon or Cape Blue, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the family Pediculariaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections. The health benefits of Selago galpinii include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues and promote wound healing, thanks to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
